title: Why Must I Be A Crustacean In Love

jokes.text: Call Robo-Rooter if you flush a toWel / We also help With an impacted boWel
jokes.setup: Standard plumbing commercial jingle
jokes.punchline: Rhyming 'towel' with 'bowel' and offering medical services
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay that escalates from innocent plumbing to scatological humor, well-executed jingle parody

jokes.text: Now this is progress: A self-microwaving Bavarian Cream Dog
jokes.setup: Fry celebrating technological advancement
jokes.punchline: The 'advancement' is just a hot dog that heats itself
jokes.explanation: Perfectly captures Fry's character - easily impressed by mundane 'futuristic' conveniences

jokes.text: Let's just pray I have the energy to get another beer
jokes.setup: Fry just celebrated technological progress
jokes.punchline: He's too lazy to even get up for a beer
jokes.explanation: Great character moment showing Fry's supreme laziness, good economy of words

jokes.text: What is this, the Middle Ages?
jokes.setup: Someone from the year 3000 complaining about primitive conditions
jokes.punchline: References the Middle Ages as if it's recent history
jokes.explanation: Clever perspective joke that plays with the show's time period setting

jokes.text: You've become a fat sack of crap. - Sack?
jokes.setup: Leela insults Bender calling him fat sack of crap
jokes.punchline: Bender only objects to being called a 'sack'
jokes.explanation: Excellent character moment - Bender's vanity makes him focus on the wrong part of the insult. Great economy and misdirection

jokes.text: Bender, your beer belly's so big your door won't close
jokes.setup: Standard fat joke setup
jokes.punchline: Robot-specific problem - his access panel won't close
jokes.explanation: Good sci-fi twist on a fat joke - specifically tailored to robot anatomy

jokes.text: And that doesn't make sense
jokes.setup: Bender's door won't close due to his beer belly
jokes.punchline: He points out the logical inconsistency rather than being offended
jokes.explanation: Meta-humor where character questions cartoon logic, fits Bender's personality

jokes.text: For some reason, I'm frisky as a squid on Tuesday
jokes.setup: Bender agreeing to go to the gym
jokes.punchline: Random, nonsensical simile about squid behavior
jokes.explanation: Silly absurdist line that's memorable but not particularly clever

jokes.text: Crustaceans don't like steam. I'll work out with the Nautilus
jokes.setup: Group discussion about using the steam room
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg references both his biology and the exercise equipment called Nautilus
jokes.explanation: Excellent double meaning - crustaceans literally don't like steam, and Nautilus works on multiple levels (sea creature/exercise equipment)

jokes.text: What up, Dr. Z? - Yo, yo. What's up? Give up the rock!
jokes.setup: Amy greets Zoidberg with casual slang
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg tries to respond with equally hip slang but sounds awkward
jokes.explanation: Character humor showing Zoidberg's social awkwardness when trying to be cool

jokes.text: Co-ed steam rooms. I love the future
jokes.setup: Fry observing futuristic gym amenities
jokes.punchline: His excitement is purely perverted rather than appreciating actual progress
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Fry's priorities and what impresses him about the future

jokes.text: You're in the women's steam room. - Ah, futuristic
jokes.setup: Leela corrects Fry about which steam room he's in
jokes.punchline: Fry mishears and thinks being corrected is somehow futuristic
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection and character comedy - Fry's obliviousness creates the humor

jokes.text: Look what life was like before genetic engineering. The poor 20th-century women
jokes.setup: Leela showing Fry something about pre-genetic engineering
jokes.punchline: Implies current women are artificially enhanced, making 20th century women seem inferior
jokes.explanation: Sci-fi social commentary wrapped in humor about beauty standards

jokes.text: Hey, handsome. Have room for two? - You wish
jokes.setup: Attractive woman seems to be hitting on Fry
jokes.punchline: Fry rudely rejects her, showing his social ineptitude
jokes.explanation: Great character moment - subverts expectation of Fry being excited, shows his awkwardness

jokes.text: Hey, Leela, look who's the super stud
jokes.setup: Fry just rudely rejected an attractive woman
jokes.punchline: He brags about it as if he's a ladies' man
jokes.explanation: Character comedy showing Fry's delusions about his own attractiveness

jokes.text: Someone must have turned down the gravity
jokes.setup: Observing Fry's workout performance
jokes.punchline: Sarcastically attributes his strength to reduced gravity rather than actual fitness
jokes.explanation: Clever sci-fi twist on explaining unexpected athletic performance, good deadpan delivery

jokes.text: What's that jazz on your head? - Enough questions. More weight!
jokes.setup: Amy asks about something on Zoidberg's head
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg aggressively deflects and demands more weight
jokes.explanation: Shows Zoidberg's unusual behavior and aggressive workout attitude

jokes.text: Maybe you could do more reps with less weight
jokes.setup: Reasonable fitness advice for someone struggling
jokes.punchline: Implies Zoidberg is using dangerously excessive weight
jokes.explanation: Standard setup line that works as straight man reaction to Zoidberg's excess

jokes.text: Looks like Zoidberg's finally coming out of his shell! Get it?
jokes.setup: Observing Zoidberg becoming more assertive
jokes.punchline: Pun on 'coming out of shell' since Zoidberg is a crustacean, then explains his own joke
jokes.explanation: Decent pun but explaining the joke reduces impact, very Fry-like behavior

jokes.text: Is there a doctor in the gym? - I'm a doctor!
jokes.setup: Standard emergency call for medical help
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg enthusiastically volunteers despite being the one who caused the emergency
jokes.explanation: Good ironic timing and character moment - Zoidberg's obliviousness to his own responsibility

jokes.text: Fool me seven times, shame on you. Fool me eight times, shame on me
jokes.setup: Variation on the classic 'fool me once' saying
jokes.punchline: Escalated to ridiculous numbers suggesting repeated fooling
jokes.explanation: Clever twist on familiar saying, implies Amy has been fooled many times before

jokes.text: Maybe he has a parasite. - Maybe he is one
jokes.setup: Amy suggesting medical explanation for behavior
jokes.punchline: Bender's cruel but arguably accurate assessment of Zoidberg
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender line - economical, cruel, and actually quite clever wordplay

jokes.text: It's sad when a friend goes nuts...and you have to have a clambake and cook him
jokes.setup: Bender expressing sympathy for Zoidberg's condition
jokes.punchline: Immediately turns to discussing cooking him at a clambake
jokes.explanation: Excellent Bender moment - starts sympathetic then reveals his true nature. Dark humor that's character-perfect

jokes.text: Much better. You can remove these. - I'll do it
jokes.setup: Professor says restraints can be removed safely
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg immediately volunteers, suggesting he's still dangerous
jokes.explanation: Sets up physical comedy moment, good timing on Zoidberg's eagerness

jokes.text: Look out! - Moron!
jokes.setup: Leela warns about Zoidberg being released
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg immediately attacks someone while calling them moron
jokes.explanation: Payoff to the restraint setup, Zoidberg's aggressive 'moron!' is characteristically random

jokes.text: Give it to me straight. Is it fin rot? It's fin rot, isn't it?
jokes.setup: Zoidberg asking for medical diagnosis
jokes.punchline: Immediately assumes worst-case scenario and answers his own question
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Zoidberg's hypochondriac tendencies and self-defeating pessimism

jokes.text: You're just heavy with male jelly. - Blech!
jokes.setup: Professor explains Zoidberg's condition in clinical terms
jokes.punchline: Amy's disgusted reaction to the imagery
jokes.explanation: Good reaction beat, Amy's 'blech' is natural response to gross medical explanation

jokes.text: A time when his behavior is run by the brain in his rump
jokes.setup: Professor explaining mating season biology
jokes.punchline: Reveals Zoidberg literally thinks with his butt during mating season
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurdist biology that explains Zoidberg's behavior change while being inherently funny

jokes.text: There's one thing we can do. - I'll boil the water
jokes.setup: Professor suggesting a solution to help Zoidberg
jokes.punchline: Bender immediately volunteers to cook him
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender character moment, calls back to earlier cooking joke with great timing

jokes.text: which will soon erupt in an orgy of invertebrate sex
jokes.setup: Professor describing Zoidberg's home planet during mating season
jokes.punchline: Clinical description that sounds both scientific and pornographic
jokes.explanation: Good juxtaposition of clinical language with sexual content, Professor's dry delivery helps

jokes.text: Oh, baby, I'm there! - Do you understand 'invertebrate'?
jokes.setup: Bender gets excited about sex orgy
jokes.punchline: Professor points out Bender doesn't qualify as invertebrate
jokes.explanation: Great setup/punchline with good character work - Bender's horniness vs Professor's precision

jokes.text: It's not the word I care about. No need to pack pants. Let's roll!
jokes.setup: Bender ignoring the invertebrate clarification
jokes.punchline: Still planning for sex vacation, mentions not packing pants
jokes.explanation: Pure Bender - horny, optimistic, and completely missing the point

jokes.text: Moron!
jokes.setup: Zoidberg continues his aggressive behavior
jokes.punchline: Repeats his insult from earlier
jokes.explanation: Simple callback that establishes running gag, economical but not particularly creative

jokes.text: That's how you say 'Zoidberg'?
jokes.setup: Hearing Zoidberg's name pronounced correctly by another crustacean
jokes.punchline: Implies they've all been mispronouncing it this whole time
jokes.explanation: Clever retroactive joke that recontextualizes the character's name pronunciation

jokes.text: You didn't have to point out his speech impediment
jokes.setup: Fry's comment about Zoidberg's name pronunciation
jokes.punchline: Leela treating it as insensitive comment about speech impediment
jokes.explanation: Good follow-up that adds another layer to the name pronunciation joke

jokes.text: Catch my drift?
jokes.setup: Zoidberg's clinical sex description
jokes.punchline: Asks if they understand his 'subtle' innuendo
jokes.explanation: Great ironic followup - nothing subtle about his previous statement, shows Zoidberg's cluelessness

jokes.text: I want a female swollen with eggs to accept my genetic material
jokes.setup: Zoidberg explaining what he wants instead of love
jokes.punchline: Extremely clinical and unromantic description of his desires
jokes.explanation: Peak Zoidberg dialogue - combines scientific accuracy with complete romantic cluelessness

jokes.text: You and me both
jokes.setup: Zoidberg's crude description of his mating desires
jokes.punchline: Bender expresses agreement with the sentiment
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender reaction - economical and character-appropriate horniness

jokes.text: I used to hang out here as a larva. It looked much bigger then
jokes.setup: Zoidberg showing his old childhood hangout
jokes.punchline: Universal experience of childhood places seeming smaller when you return
jokes.explanation: Relatable humor made alien by using 'larva' instead of child, good character moment

jokes.text: Who's the tough guy now, Vinnie?
jokes.setup: Zoidberg confronting something from his past
jokes.punchline: Addressing what's presumably an inanimate object as old bully
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Zoidberg's past insecurities and current false confidence

jokes.text: We fight to the death over honor...and whether abbreviations count in Scrabble. They don't!
jokes.setup: Explaining serious ritual combat reasons
jokes.punchline: Escalates from honor to petty Scrabble disputes
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation joke with perfect absurdist twist and strong opinion on Scrabble rules

jokes.text: How do I look? - Like whale barf. - Then the illusion is complete
jokes.setup: Zoidberg asking how he looks for his mating display
jokes.punchline: Takes Bender's insult as confirmation he looks good
jokes.explanation: Excellent subversion - Zoidberg's species finds disgusting things attractive, perfect character logic

jokes.text: He's no different from you organisms...shooting DNA at each other to make babies
jokes.setup: Observing crustacean mating behavior
jokes.punchline: Clinical description that applies to all sexual reproduction
jokes.explanation: Good scientific perspective humor that makes normal reproduction sound alien

jokes.text: It's offensive! - Keep your jelly away from my eggs
jokes.setup: Fry finding the mating display offensive
jokes.punchline: Female crustacean's crude rejection
jokes.explanation: Decent cringe humor with alien biology terms, shows cultural differences

jokes.text: He's a loser, that's why. The lobster equivalent of Fry
jokes.setup: Why is Zoidberg still alone at the mating ritual
jokes.punchline: Bender compares him to Fry, implying Fry is also a loser
jokes.explanation: Classic Bender cruelty that insults two characters efficiently, good comparative humor

jokes.text: I can get any girl, any time. I'm just too busy
jokes.setup: Fry responding to being called a loser
jokes.punchline: Classic excuse used by unsuccessful people
jokes.explanation: Realistic character response but not particularly original, works for Fry's defensive nature

jokes.text: My face was covered with barnacles
jokes.setup: Zoidberg reminding Edna who he is from high school
jokes.punchline: His identifying feature was facial barnacles
jokes.explanation: Great alien biology humor that suggests an awkward adolescence, very Zoidberg

jokes.text: I heard you became a rich doctor. - I've performed a few mercy killings
jokes.setup: Edna mentions hearing he's a successful doctor
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg casually mentions mercy killings instead of medical success
jokes.explanation: Dark humor masterpiece - subverts medical success expectations with casual admission of euthanasia

jokes.text: Maybe a rock star. - Or a doctor?
jokes.setup: Edna saying she needs a mate stuffed with jelly, maybe a rock star
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg hopefully suggests doctor as alternative
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Zoidberg's hopeful desperation and social cluelessness

jokes.text: I'm sorry. You're just an inferior male specimen
jokes.setup: Edna's rejection of Zoidberg
jokes.punchline: Brutal clinical assessment delivered matter-of-factly
jokes.explanation: Harsh but funny rejection that fits the species' clinical approach to mating

jokes.text: Did you see those guys? They were giant claws with bodies
jokes.setup: Zoidberg lamenting his inadequacy
jokes.punchline: Describes competition as essentially all claw
jokes.explanation: Good visual humor description that shows Zoidberg's insecurity about his body

jokes.text: You didn't smell as bad. - You're right. My stink gland is weak. Smell!
jokes.setup: Bender trying to console Zoidberg about his advantages
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg agrees and forces Bender to smell him
jokes.explanation: Good alien biology humor where bad smell is desirable, typical Zoidberg self-awareness

jokes.text: If a guy ever did that, I'd know it. Wait a second. They've all done that. Even Sean!
jokes.setup: Amy claiming she'd recognize that manipulation
jokes.punchline: Realizes all her boyfriends have used that exact technique
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation joke with perfect realization moment, great Amy character development

jokes.text: She's not. She just has the largest clutch of eggs
jokes.setup: Told to say a female is special
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg's clinical reason why she's desirable
jokes.explanation: Perfect Zoidberg logic - completely missing the point of romance with scientific accuracy

jokes.text: It's all so complicated. The romance and the lies upon lies
jokes.setup: Zoidberg learning about human courtship
jokes.punchline: Accurately describes dating as built on deception
jokes.explanation: Good observational humor about dating culture from outsider perspective

jokes.text: Now there's a bird involved?
jokes.setup: Fry saying he'll take Zoidberg 'under his wing'
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg takes the metaphor literally
jokes.explanation: Classic Zoidberg literal interpretation of idiom, shows his alien perspective

jokes.text: You just want to talk. - I just want to talk. - That doesn't make sense. - That doesn't make sense. But okay
jokes.setup: Fry coaching Zoidberg on what to say
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg repeats everything exactly, including the confusion
jokes.explanation: Good escalation showing Zoidberg following instructions too literally

jokes.text: You seem malnourished. Do you suffer from parasites?
jokes.setup: Told to tell her she looks thin
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg's medical approach to complimenting appearance
jokes.explanation: Brilliant subversion of dating advice through Zoidberg's medical perspective - perfectly in character

jokes.text: Yes. Thanks for noticing
jokes.setup: Zoidberg's bizarre medical compliment
jokes.punchline: Edna appreciates being asked about her parasites
jokes.explanation: Great alien culture humor where medical concerns are romantic compliments

jokes.text: Look, she won't shut up. - It's normal. Just nod and say, 'Uh-huh.'
jokes.setup: Zoidberg getting frustrated with conversation
jokes.punchline: Fry's cynical but practical dating advice
jokes.explanation: Realistic dating humor that many can relate to, good mentor-student dynamic

jokes.text: It's crazy, but when you talk this way...your obvious deficiencies seem less obvious
jokes.setup: Edna responding to Zoidberg's conversation attempts
jokes.punchline: Backhanded compliment about his improved attractiveness
jokes.explanation: Good character development showing how conversation skills can overcome physical shortcomings

jokes.text: You even stink more
jokes.setup: Edna continuing her assessment of Zoidberg's improved attractiveness
jokes.punchline: In their species, stinking more is attractive
jokes.explanation: Callbacks to earlier stink gland joke with alien courtship biology

jokes.text: Ask to mate? - Third date
jokes.setup: Zoidberg ready to ask for mating
jokes.punchline: Fry's arbitrary human dating rule
jokes.explanation: Good contrast between Zoidberg's direct approach and human dating customs

jokes.text: Since then, I've been called 'Honest Bender'
jokes.setup: Bender telling a story about returning something
jokes.punchline: Claims to be known for honesty despite being a notorious thief
jokes.explanation: Perfect ironic character humor - Bender claiming honesty is inherently funny

jokes.text: Turn it over. - Oh. 'Edna! Of all the gross crab monsters on this planet...you are the hottest.'
jokes.setup: Reading what's presumably a romantic note
jokes.punchline: Backhanded compliment calling her gross but hottest among gross things
jokes.explanation: Good subversion of romantic note expectations with alien perspective on beauty

jokes.text: That's the most beautiful thing. - Yes. Well...excuse me. I must powder my flaps
jokes.setup: Edna moved by the romantic note
jokes.punchline: Alien equivalent of 'powder my nose' using gross anatomy
jokes.explanation: Excellent alien biology humor updating familiar euphemism with disgusting twist

jokes.text: Me too
jokes.setup: Edna going to powder her flaps
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg also needs to powder his flaps
jokes.explanation: Simple followup that extends the gross biology joke, typical Zoidberg TMI

jokes.text: Is it love when you care for a female for reasons beyond mating?
jokes.setup: Zoidberg experiencing new emotions
jokes.punchline: Clinical but touching description of what love might be
jokes.explanation: Good character development moment with humor in Zoidberg's clinical approach to emotion

jokes.text: No. Must be some alien emotion
jokes.setup: Zoidberg wondering if what he feels is love
jokes.punchline: Dismisses love as alien concept despite being the alien
jokes.explanation: Excellent ironic reversal - the alien character calling human emotions alien

jokes.text: Do you have idiots on your planet? - Fry?
jokes.setup: Edna asking about idiots on Earth
jokes.punchline: Leela immediately thinks of Fry as the example
jokes.explanation: Excellent economy and character relationship humor - Leela's instant association

jokes.text: Words of such beauty came from the blowhole of that hideous alien?
jokes.setup: Learning Fry wrote the romantic words
jokes.punchline: Describes Fry as hideous alien with blowhole
jokes.explanation: Good alien perspective humor calling human the hideous alien

jokes.text: Can I interest you in some surf and turf?
jokes.setup: Edna seducing Fry
jokes.punchline: Surf and turf has literal meaning when she's a sea creature
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay that works on multiple levels with alien biology

jokes.text: He's got jelly out the wazoo. - That is where it comes out
jokes.setup: Fry using idiom about having lots of jelly
jokes.punchline: Edna takes it literally regarding crustacean anatomy
jokes.explanation: Brilliant literal interpretation of idiom with disgusting biological accuracy

jokes.text: I'm flattered. If I did it with a mudbug, you'd top the list
jokes.setup: Edna's romantic advances
jokes.punchline: Fry's backhanded compliment about inter-species attraction
jokes.explanation: Good awkward character moment with Fry's typical social ineptitude

jokes.text: We're in love, and we're mating tomorrow!
jokes.setup: Caught with Fry, needs to explain situation
jokes.punchline: Announces relationship and immediate mating plans
jokes.explanation: Good escalation that makes situation worse, typical soap opera development

jokes.text: What?! - Fry! I challenge you to Claw Plock! - English, please? - A fight to the death!
jokes.setup: Zoidberg challenging Fry using alien terminology
jokes.punchline: Fry needs translation, reveals it's fight to death
jokes.explanation: Good escalation with callback to earlier world-building, typical Fry confusion

jokes.text: And if you survive, we'll make sweet love
jokes.setup: Death match between Fry and Zoidberg
jokes.punchline: Edna's casual attitude about potential death of her new lover
jokes.explanation: Dark humor showing alien casual attitude toward death and romance

jokes.text: But I don't want her! - The tradition of Claw Plock can't be taken back
jokes.setup: Fry trying to get out of death match
jokes.punchline: Bureaucratic inflexibility about deadly traditions
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist bureaucracy humor, typical sci-fi social commentary

jokes.text: It is a recent tradition, only 18 years old, but it is a tradition
jokes.setup: Explaining why tradition can't be changed
jokes.punchline: Tradition is extremely recent but still inflexible
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurdist logic about how quickly something becomes unchangeable tradition

jokes.text: Of course I'm being irrational! I'm in love!
jokes.setup: Accused of being irrational
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg embraces irrationality as part of love
jokes.explanation: Good character development showing Zoidberg's growth in understanding love

jokes.text: Yet I embrace celibacy to uphold our crazy traditions
jokes.setup: Leela continuing her false identity argument
jokes.punchline: Claims to embrace celibacy while calling traditions crazy
jokes.explanation: Good follow-up to the absurd argument with subtle criticism of the tradition

jokes.text: Large bet on me in round one!
jokes.setup: Just confirmed disemboweling is fatal
jokes.punchline: Immediately bets on quick victory
jokes.explanation: Good followup showing Zoidberg's confidence after confirming his deadly plan

jokes.text: Today I got up and I had a piece of toast...then I brushed my teeth...
jokes.setup: Fry given chance to make final statement
jokes.punchline: Repeats Edna's boring daily routine story
jokes.explanation: Excellent callback showing Fry absorbed the mundane details from earlier conversation

jokes.text: Nobody correct him
jokes.setup: Zoidberg targeting the wrong anatomy
jokes.punchline: Fry doesn't want to give away his advantage
jokes.explanation: Excellent economy and character logic - Fry's smart enough to keep the mistake

jokes.text: It's a fight to the death! - Suddenly it's all about you! Sheesh
jokes.setup: Fry pointing out he could die
jokes.punchline: Leela treats his self-preservation as selfish
jokes.explanation: Brilliant character moment - Leela's complete lack of empathy for Fry's situation

jokes.text: but will killing someone with a nutcracker solve anything?
jokes.setup: Fry questioning the logic of ritual combat
jokes.punchline: Describes Zoidberg's claws as nutcrackers
jokes.explanation: Good visual humor reducing deadly claws to kitchen utensils

jokes.text: You bastard! I'll kill you! You bastard!
jokes.setup: Fry's friendship speech
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg attacks during the touching moment
jokes.explanation: Standard physical comedy interruption, good timing but not particularly original

jokes.text: Oh, my God! The frenzy! Oh, the greatest experience in life and I missed it
jokes.setup: Zoidberg realizes mating season has ended while he was fighting
jokes.punchline: Laments missing the sexual experience he'd been anticipating
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing consequences of the fight - Zoidberg's ultimate loss

jokes.text: The frenzy is over. How will I get rid of my jelly now?
jokes.setup: Zoidberg missed mating season
jokes.punchline: Clinical concern about biological waste disposal
jokes.explanation: Typical Zoidberg TMI moment with biological accuracy, perfectly in character

tmdb_overview: When Dr. Zoidberg runs amok during the Decapodian mating season, Fry sets out to teach him how to woo a mate. Things backfire when Zoidberg's desired mate falls for Fry instead, and Zoidberg challenges Fry to a battle to the death.
